landing-secondary_headline: Join a table and start winning

homepage_hero-desc-1: Every card is encrypted before it leaves your device.
homepage_hero-desc-2: The server cannot see your hand. Neither can we.
homepage_features-tag: What Traditional Poker Rooms Hide From You
homepage_features-title: Your Cards Are Invisible to Everyone but You
homepage_features-subtitle-1: In a normal poker room, the server knows every card.
homepage_feature-encrypted-desc: Your hole cards are locked before they leave your browser. Even a server breach exposes nothing.
homepage_feature-shuffle-desc: Every player shuffles the deck. No single person — not even the platform — knows the card order.
homepage_feature-unlock-title: Only Your Browser Can Unlock Your Hand
homepage_feature-unlock-desc: Your private key never leaves your device. The server can never peek at your cards.
homepage_feature-keys-desc: Your private key stays on your device. You control access, or safely delegate it.
homepage_benefits-tag: The House Cannot Cheat What It Cannot See
homepage_benefits-title: Keep Your Edge. Keep Your Privacy.
homepage_benefits-subtitle: Lower fees. Zero server visibility. Games that run forever.
homepage_benefit-auditable-desc: Every hand leaves a cryptographic proof. Anyone can verify fairness. No trust required.
homepage_benefit-instant-desc: Open your browser and play. No downloads, no accounts, no waiting.
homepage_benefit-fee-desc: Traditional platforms take 2-5% per pot. We take less than 1%. That difference adds up fast.
homepage_benefit-uptime-desc: Built on decentralized infrastructure. No single point of failure means no "server maintenance" excuses.
homepage_how-title: How We Deal a Hand Without Seeing Your Cards
homepage_how-subtitle: No math degree required. Here is exactly what happens, step by step.
homepage_step-lock-desc: Each player adds a digital lock to the deck. No one can open it alone.
homepage_step-shuffle-desc: Every player shuffles in turn. The final order is random and unknown to anyone.
homepage_step-deal-desc: Cards are dealt while locked. The server sees only encrypted data.
homepage_step-reveal-desc: When it is time to show, your browser unlocks your cards locally using your private key.
homepage_step-community-desc: The shared cards are unlocked piece by piece by all players working together.
homepage_step-verify-desc: Every action leaves a proof. If anything was tampered with, anyone can spot it instantly.
homepage_cta-desc: Join a table in seconds. No downloads. No hidden cards. No house edge.
homepage_footer-tagline: Trust the math, not the house.
gametable_event-detail-empty: Click an event above to view cryptographic proof details
narration_waiting: Waiting for players. This table has no dealer — dealing is entirely governed by multi-party cryptographic protocols.
narration_shuffling: Shuffle phase: each player re-encrypts the deck in turn and submits a ZK proof. On-chain verification must pass before the next round. No one can peek at or tamper with the card order.
narration_shuffle-complete: Shuffle complete — all ShuffleProofs verified on-chain. Dealing hole cards now; each card requires multi-party decryption to be revealed.
narration_pre-flop-reveal: Shuffle complete — all ShuffleProofs verified on-chain. Dealing hole cards now; each card requires multi-party decryption to be revealed.
narration_pre-flop: Pre-flop betting round. Hole cards are decryptable only by their holder — on-chain stores only ciphertext. Spectators and opponents cannot see them.
narration_flop-reveal: Flop: 3 community cards are decrypted one by one via each player's RevealToken, with Chaum-Pedersen proofs confirming legitimate decryption.
narration_flop: Post-flop betting round. Community cards are verifiably public — bets are based on real hand strength.
narration_turn-reveal: Turn: the 4th community card is decrypted, also with a ZK proof attached.
narration_river-reveal: River: the final community card is decrypted.
narration_river: Post-river betting round — the final round of betting.
narration_showdown-reveal: Showdown: all remaining players reveal their hole cards. On-chain verification of each card's decryption proof confirms no cheating.
narration_showdown: Showdown settlement: hand evaluation and side-pot allocation are completed on-chain — results are verifiable.
narration_hand-complete: Hand complete. The entire hand — from shuffle to settlement — is trustless, with no trusted third party.
shuffle-proof_placeholder: No shuffle proof data yet, waiting for player submission...
shuffle-proof_commitment-layer: Commitment Layer · Weighted Sum of Input Ciphertexts
login_oauth-note-1: Social login uses zkLogin — no wallet extension needed.
login_oauth-note-2: Your Sui address is derived from your OAuth account securely.
